description: The MVP baseball cap from '47, the world-renowned, family-founded expert in sportswear and headwear. Let everyone know if you are the top of the league or lose with pride with the vast selection of MVP baseball caps from 47, made with only the highest quality materials. Team Spirit Show off your love for your team in style and comfort with this officially licensed headwear from '47, the family-based sportswear experts. Made from the highest quality materials, this acrylic cotton blend cap is both comfortable and stylish, perfect for any day of the week. One size fits all. Thanks to the adjustable Velcro closure of the cap, the '47 brand baseball caps fit any adult head. Be looking for the range of strap fasteners in different styles. Pre-washed for a softer feel. Each '47 item is pre-washed to ensure it has a softer look and feel, making it comfortable to wear every time, and without losing the brightness or color of the embroidered logo. High-quality materials. Our headwear is made of high quality material that is both soft and sturdy, and made with a durable design so that your hat will last longer and withstand any daily wear and tear. '47 - A Family Business In 1947, twin brothers and Italian immigrants, Arthur and Henry D'Angelo founded a company in Boston, MA, selling sports memorabilia on the streets around Fenway Park. They grew their business from a single street car to a premier sports lifestyle brand. Now known as '47, they produce a unique blend of the finest headwear and apparel with unparalleled attention to detail, and have become a world-class sportswear brand. '47 is proud to be an officially licensed product featuring the most important professional worldwide sports leagues - MLB, NFL, NBA, NHL, MLS and EPL.
